creator: bsd-unix@embarqmail.com
text:
Example ports/UPDATING entry:

20131214:
  AFFECTS: users of databases/db4*

Using "pkg updating" does not show this entry even though db42-4.2.52_5 is installed.

pkg version: pkg-1.2.3

How-To-Repeat: Use "pkg updating" to check UPDATING entry containing wildcard (*) for some
installed port.
